description: Phase 1 regulatory sources. Place PDFs in this folder with the exact 'file' name. All sources are public and traceable.
gdpr_scope_note: Only pharma-relevant GDPR articles (e.g. 4, 5, 6, 9, 17) are used for compliance reasoning; full regulation is stored for traceability.

sources.name: Brief Summary and Adequate Directions for Use: Disclosing Risk Information in Consumer-Directed Print Advertisements and Promotional Labeling for Prescription Drugs (Aug 2015, Rev 2)
Postmarketing Safety Reporting for Human Drug and Biological Products (Guidance for Industry)
Best Practices for FDA Staff in the Postmarketing Safety Surveillance of Human Drug and Biological Products (Jan 2024)
GVP Module VI: Management and reporting of adverse reactions to medicinal products (Rev 1)
Pharmacovigilance Guidance Document for Marketing Authorization Holders of Pharmaceutical Products (Version 2.0)
Drugs and Magic Remedies (Objectionable Advertisements) Act, 1954
ICH E2D: Post-Approval Safety Data Management: Definitions and Standards for Expedited Reporting
HIPAA Privacy Rule (45 CFR Part 160 and Subparts A and E of Part 164)
